title: In Your Light

sections.label: Intro
lines: In the depths, a love unspoken,
Mountains quake where words are broken.

sections.label: Verse 1
lines: Your mercy reaches to the skies,
A boundless truth that never dies.
Like rivers flowing, crystal clear,
Your justice calms each trembling fear.

sections.label: Pre-Chorus
lines: Oh, shadowed hearts, lift your gaze,
Feel the warmth of endless days.

sections.label: Chorus
lines: In Your light, we see the dawn,
The darkest night, forever gone.
Through love unbound, we rise and sing,
Eternal life in everything.

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: Beneath Your wings, the weary hide,
Through storms of doubt, You’re still the guide.
Your feast of joy, a table spread,
Where living waters keep us fed.

sections.label: Bridge
lines: Oh, fountain of the purest grace,
Each soul renewed, no time, no space.
A refuge strong, a love complete,
Where every broken heart will meet.

sections.label: Chorus
lines: In Your light, we see the dawn,
The darkest night, forever gone.
Through love unbound, we rise and sing,
Eternal life in everything.

sections.label: Outro
lines: In the silence, whispers stay,
Guiding us to endless day.

epigraph: in thy light shall we see light
